project.name: MorningBriefing
project.description: Daily news briefing with Observer Commentary. Tracks NYT and WSJ briefings with PDF and Web version support.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project documentation files including README and requirements

layers.name: Web Frontend
layers.description: Main HTML pages, styles, and archive for the briefing website

layers.name: Briefing Pages
layers.description: Daily NYT and WSJ briefing HTML pages with observer commentary

layers.name: Bundled Assets
layers.description: Auto-generated CSS and JavaScript assets from Kimi web integration

layers.name: Python Scripts
layers.description: Server and automation scripts for building and serving briefings

layers.name: Data & Configuration
layers.description: JSON data files for reports index and observer configuration

layers.name: Demo Pages
layers.description: Sample/demo HTML pages and their assets

layers.name: Miscellaneous
layers.description: Other project files not fitting other layers

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: MorningBriefing is a daily news briefing system that tracks NYT and WSJ articles with Chinese observer commentary. Start here to understand the project's purpose and structure.

tour.title: Requirements & Architecture
tour.description: Review the detailed requirements document that outlines the full architecture, including the three-observer analysis system, PDF management, and deployment considerations.

tour.title: Web Server Entry Point
tour.description: The Python HTTP server that serves the briefing website, mounting external PDF directories under /reports/ for browser access.

tour.title: Main Website Pages
tour.description: The main index.html provides today's NYT and WSJ links with three observer analysis sections. archive.html allows browsing past briefings by date.

tour.title: Styling System
tour.description: Dark-themed CSS stylesheet that defines the visual presentation of the briefing website, including observer analysis sections and PDF link formatting.

tour.title: Daily Update Automation
tour.description: The main automation script that generates daily NYT and WSJ briefing pages with observer commentary sections. This is the core content pipeline.

tour.title: Combined HTML Builder
tour.description: Builds a combined NYT + WSJ HTML page from the latest source files for consolidated reading.

tour.title: Index Management
tour.description: CLI tools for updating the reports index JSON and generating sample briefing content.

tour.title: Data Layer
tour.description: JSON indices that track all briefing entries by date and source, plus the observer configuration data.

tour.title: Briefing Gallery
tour.description: A gallery-style HTML page that displays all available briefing entries with visual navigation.
